positive: Minimalist vector art illustration of a celestial forest scene. A lone, stylized crescent moon hangs over giant, bioluminescent mushroom caps and twisting, geometric tree roots. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, electric teal, gold foil accents, and stark white. The composition should be centered, suitable for printing on dark fabric. High contrast, strong silhouettes, clean lines, and a repeating, seamless pattern element should be visible in the background texture. Flat graphic design style, perfect for apparel printing.
